channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Why shouldn't you tell a secret on a farm?
item.description:
Why shouldn't you tell a secret on a farm?
Because the potatoes have eyes and the corns have ears!

item.title: What is the pretzel's favourite dance?
item.description:
What is the pretzel's favourite dance?
The twist!

item.title: What do elves make sandwiches with?
item.description:
What do elves make sandwiches with?
Shortbread!

item.title: The customer said 'Do you serve crabs here?'
item.description:
The customer said 'Do you serve crabs here?'
Yes Sir,' said the waiter 'we serve just about anybody!'

item.title: What did the hungry computer eat?
item.description:
What did the hungry computer eat?
Chips one byte at a time!

item.title: What do polar bears eat for lunch?
item.description:
What do polar bears eat for lunch?
Ice berg-ers!

item.title: Waiter, will my pizza be long?
item.description:
Waiter, will my pizza be long?
No sir, it will be round!

item.title: How do pickles enjoy a day out?
item.description:
How do pickles enjoy a day out?
They relish it!

item.title: What has ears but can't hear?
item.description:
What has ears but can't hear?
A cornfield.

item.title: Why don't oysters like to share their pearls?
item.description:
Why don't oysters like to share their pearls?
Because they are shellfish.
